suspend_tip_title: The device will automatically suspend in 5 seconds
suspend_tip_body: Press any gamepad key to cancel
bg_tip: Register for D-Bus service and listen for inhibit screensaver requests from applications.
notify_tip: Send notifications when certain applications request to modify the status of the screensaver
manual_tip: If some software doesn't send D-Bus requests, you can click on a process name in the list below to add it to the inhibit list.
